hero_desc: Tournaments, clinics, fitness challenges, socials, and special events — there's always something exciting at Los Cab.

events.title: OC Open Pickleball Classic — Spring Edition
events.desc: Annual open-level pickleball tournament welcoming players from across Orange County. Divisions for 3.0, 3.5, 4.0, and 4.5+ skill levels. Registration via Team Reach.

events.title: Spring HIIT Challenge — 4-Week Program
events.desc: Kick off spring fitness with a 4-week HIIT challenge. Includes weekly group sessions, nutrition tips, and a leaderboard. All fitness levels welcome.

events.title: Member Mixer — Cinco de Mayo Celebration
events.desc: Join us for our annual member mixer with live music, catering by Teak, and community fun. A great way to meet fellow members across all sports programs.

events.title: Los Cab Junior Tennis Championship
events.desc: Annual junior tennis tournament for our youth academy players. Divisions by age group and skill level, with a celebration and awards ceremony following.

events.title: SoCal Handball National Invitational
events.desc: Los Cab hosts its annual handball invitational, welcoming national-level players to compete on our premier concrete and glass-wall handball courts.

events.title: 🏸 Badminton Program Relaunch — Grand Opening
events.desc: The Los Cab Badminton program officially relaunches under the direction of Michael Do. Join us for the grand opening day — orientation, open play, and introductory clinics.

venue_title: Book Timeless Venues for Your Next Event
venue_text: Los Cab's 4,000 sq. ft. event space is available for private bookings — from corporate meetings and conferences to weddings, receptions, and birthday celebrations.

venue_features.title: 4,000 Sq. Ft. Versatile Space
venue_features.desc: Configurable for any event size — roundtables, theatre-style, cocktail, or banquet setup.

venue_features.title: Teak Catering On-Site
venue_features.desc: Full catering services available through our in-house team led by Chef Pierre.

venue_features.title: Beautiful Courtyard Setting
venue_features.desc: Access to the tennis courtyard with cabanas as an outdoor extension of your event space.

cta_text: Stay updated on all Los Cab events — join as a member and get first access to registrations.
